raw: {"questions":[{"label":"School load balance","name":"How is school fitting around your other interests right now?","description":"Surfaces whether school is crowding out the rest of her life or leaving room for what she cares about.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Peer connection","name":"Who at school do you feel most connected to lately?","description":"Looks for the quality of her social support at school without assuming it is good or bad.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"School energy","name":"What part of school has been giving you the most energy lately?","description":"Finds the work or moments that are genuinely motivating, beyond a generic check-in.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"School momentum","name":"What part of school has felt most worth showing up for lately?","description":"Surfaces intrinsic pull and ownership in her day-to-day school experience.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Learning stretch","name":"Where at school are you getting pushed in a good way?","description":"Checks whether she is stretched enough to be learning, without implying she should be struggling.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Skill appetite","name":"What skill would you most like to get better at this term?","description":"Surfaces her own development priorities and whether she has a concrete growth target.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support from manager","name":"What would make these check-ins more useful for you?","description":"Identifies what support or structure she actually wants from the manager.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"Where do you want more say in how your school work gets shaped?","description":"Tests appetite for autonomy and whether she wants more ownership over choices.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback landing","name":"How does feedback usually land for you?","description":"Surfaces how she receives guidance and whether it helps her improve or gets lost.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next stretch","name":"What would feel like a real step up for you over the next few weeks?","description":"Looks for a concrete next stretch rather than vague ambition.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]}]}
